mapper.select: /* SQL ID : selectConvertCClassList 설 명 : 성적기초정보관리 > 성적환산등급 */ SELECT ORG_ID , MRK_GRDCD , UNIV_CD , AVG_CRDTS , CRTR_SCR , START_SCR , END_SCR , GRD_SEQ , USEYN , RGTR_ID , FRST_INQ_DTTM , MDFR_ID , MOD_DTTM FROM TB_LMS_MRK_CNVS_GRD WHERE ORG_ID = #{orgId} AND UNIV_CD = 'C' ORDER BY GRD_SEQ

/* SQL ID : selectConvertGClassList 설 명 : 성적기초정보관리 > 성적환산등급 */ SELECT ORG_ID , MRK_GRDCD , UNIV_CD , AVG_CRDTS , CRTR_SCR , START_SCR , END_SCR , GRD_SEQ , USEYN , RGTR_ID , FRST_INQ_DTTM , MDFR_ID , MOD_DTTM FROM TB_LMS_MRK_CNVS_GRD WHERE ORG_ID = #{orgId} AND UNIV_CD = 'G' ORDER BY GRD_SEQ

/* SQL ID : editConvertClassView 설 명 : 성적기초정보관리 > 성적환산등급 */ SELECT ORG_ID , MRK_GRDCD , AVG_CRDTS , CRTR_SCR , START_SCR , END_SCR , GRD_SEQ , USEYN , RGTR_ID , FRST_INQ_DTTM , MDFR_ID , MOD_DTTM FROM TB_LMS_MRK_CNVS_GRD WHERE ORG_ID = 'ORG0000001' AND MRK_GRDCD = #{scorCd}

/* SQL ID : selectRelativeCClassList 설 명 : 성적기초정보관리 > 상대평가비율 */ SELECT ORG_ID , EVL_CRTR_CD , UNIV_CD , SMRK_GRDCD , END_SCR_CD , SPRCNTL , END_PRCNTL , GRD_SEQ , USEYN , RGTR_ID , FRST_INQ_DTTM , MDFR_ID , MOD_DTTM FROM MRK_RLTV_EVL_CRTRRT WHERE ORG_ID = #{orgId} AND UNIV_CD = 'C' ORDER BY GRD_SEQ

/* SQL ID : selectRelativeGClassList 설 명 : 성적기초정보관리 > 상대평가비율 */ SELECT ORG_ID , EVL_CRTR_CD , UNIV_CD , SMRK_GRDCD , END_SCR_CD , SPRCNTL , END_PRCNTL , GRD_SEQ , USEYN , RGTR_ID , FRST_INQ_DTTM , MDFR_ID , MOD_DTTM FROM MRK_RLTV_EVL_CRTRRT WHERE ORG_ID = #{orgId} AND UNIV_CD = 'G' ORDER BY GRD_SEQ

/* SQL ID : editRelativeClassView 설 명 : 성적기초정보관리 > 상대평가비율 */ SELECT ORG_ID , EVL_CRTR_CD , SMRK_GRDCD , END_SCR_CD , SPRCNTL , END_PRCNTL , GRD_SEQ , USEYN , RGTR_ID , FRST_INQ_DTTM , MDFR_ID , MOD_DTTM FROM MRK_RLTV_EVL_CRTRRT WHERE ORG_ID = 'ORG0000001' AND EVL_CRTR_CD = #{scorRelCd}

/* SQL ID : selectAttendOpenClassWeek 설 명 : 출석점수기준 강의오픈일 조회 */ SELECT MRK_STNG_CD AS OPEN_WEEK_CD , MRK_STNG_CDNM AS OPEN_WEEK_NM , MRK_STNG_VL AS OPEN_WEEK_VAL FROM TB_LMS_SCORE_ATND_CONF WHERE ORG_ID = 'ORG0000001' AND MRK_STNG_GBNCD = 'LESSON' AND MRK_STNG_CD = 'OPEN_WEEK'

/* SQL ID : selectAttendOpenClassTm 설 명 : 출석점수기준 강의오픈시간 조회 */ SELECT MRK_STNG_CD AS OPEN_TM_CD , MRK_STNG_CDNM AS OPEN_TM_NM , MRK_STNG_VL AS OPEN_TM_VAL FROM TB_LMS_SCORE_ATND_CONF WHERE ORG_ID = 'ORG0000001' AND MRK_STNG_GBNCD = 'LESSON' AND MRK_STNG_CD = 'OPEN_TM'

/* SQL ID : selectAttendOpenClassWeekAp 설 명 : 출석점수기준 강의1주 오픈일 조회 */ SELECT MRK_STNG_CD AS OPEN_WEEK1_AP_CD , MRK_STNG_CDNM AS OPEN_WEEK1_AP_NM , MRK_STNG_VL AS OPEN_WEEK1_AP_VAL FROM TB_LMS_SCORE_ATND_CONF WHERE ORG_ID = 'ORG0000001' AND MRK_STNG_GBNCD = 'LESSON' AND MRK_STNG_CD = 'OPEN_WEEK1_AP'

/* SQL ID : selectAttendOpenClassWeekTm 설 명 : 출석점수기준 강의1주 오픈 시간 조회 */ SELECT MRK_STNG_CD AS OPEN_WEEK1_TM_CD , MRK_STNG_CDNM AS OPEN_WEEK1_TM_NM , MRK_STNG_VL AS OPEN_WEEK1_TM_VAL FROM TB_LMS_SCORE_ATND_CONF WHERE ORG_ID = 'ORG0000001' AND MRK_STNG_GBNCD = 'LESSON' AND MRK_STNG_CD = 'OPEN_WEEK1_TM'

/* SQL ID : selectAttendAnceClassTerm 설 명 : 출석점수기준 출석인정기간 주차 조회 */ SELECT MRK_STNG_CD AS ATEND_TERM_CD , MRK_STNG_CDNM AS ATEND_TERM_NM , MRK_STNG_VL AS ATEND_TERM_VAL FROM TB_LMS_SCORE_ATND_CONF WHERE ORG_ID = 'ORG0000001' AND MRK_STNG_GBNCD = 'LESSON' AND MRK_STNG_CD = 'ATND_AVAL_TERM'

/* SQL ID : selectAttendAnceClassTermWeek 설 명 : 출석점수기준 출석인정기간 1주차 조회 */ SELECT MRK_STNG_CD AS ATEND_WEEK_CD , MRK_STNG_CDNM AS ATEND_WEEK_NM , MRK_STNG_VL AS ATEND_WEEK_VAL FROM TB_LMS_SCORE_ATND_CONF WHERE ORG_ID = 'ORG0000001' AND MRK_STNG_GBNCD = 'LESSON' AND MRK_STNG_CD = 'ATND_AVAL_TERM_WEEK1'

/* SQL ID : selectAttendRatioRegularClass 설 명 : 출석점수기준 강의 출석률(정규학기) 조회 */ SELECT MRK_STNG_CD AS ATND_RATIO_CD , MRK_STNG_CDNM AS ATND_RATIO_NM , MRK_STNG_VL AS ATND_RATIO_VAL FROM TB_LMS_SCORE_ATND_CONF WHERE ORG_ID = 'ORG0000001' AND MRK_STNG_GBNCD = 'LESSON' AND MRK_STNG_CD = 'ATND_RATIO'

/* SQL ID : selectLateRatioRegularClass 설 명 : 출석점수기준 강의 지각률(정규학기) 조회 */ SELECT MRK_STNG_CD AS LATE_RATIO_CD , MRK_STNG_CDNM AS LATE_RATIO_NM , MRK_STNG_VL AS LATE_RATIO_VAL FROM TB_LMS_SCORE_ATND_CONF WHERE ORG_ID = 'ORG0000001' AND MRK_STNG_GBNCD = 'LESSON' AND MRK_STNG_CD = 'LATE_RATIO'

/* SQL ID : selectAbsentRatioRegularClass 설 명 : 출석점수기준 강의 결석률(정규학기) 조회 */ SELECT MRK_STNG_CD AS ABSENT_RATIO_CD , MRK_STNG_CDNM AS ABSENT_RATIO_NM , MRK_STNG_VL AS ABSENT_RATIO_VAL FROM TB_LMS_SCORE_ATND_CONF WHERE ORG_ID = 'ORG0000001' AND MRK_STNG_GBNCD = 'LESSON' AND MRK_STNG_CD = 'ABSENT_RATIO'

/* SQL ID : selectAtndWeekSeasonClass 설 명 : 출석점수기준 강의 계절학기 출석주차 조회 */ SELECT MRK_STNG_CD AS SEN_LESN_WEEK_CD , MRK_STNG_CDNM AS SEN_LESN_WEEK_NM , MRK_STNG_VL AS SEN_LESN_WEEK_VAL FROM TB_LMS_SCORE_ATND_CONF WHERE ORG_ID = 'ORG0000001' AND MRK_STNG_GBNCD = 'LESSON' AND MRK_STNG_CD = 'SEN_ATND_WEEK'

/* SQL ID : selectAtndRatioSeasonClass 설 명 : 출석점수기준 강의 계절학기 출석비율 조회 */ SELECT MRK_STNG_CD AS SEN_ATND_RATIO_CD , MRK_STNG_CDNM AS SEN_ATND_RATIO_NM , MRK_STNG_VL AS SEN_ATND_RATIO_VAL FROM TB_LMS_SCORE_ATND_CONF WHERE ORG_ID = 'ORG0000001' AND MRK_STNG_GBNCD = 'LESSON' AND MRK_STNG_CD = 'SEN_ATND_RATIO'

/* SQL ID : selectAbsentRatioSeasonClass 설 명 : 출석점수기준 강의 계절학기 결석비율 정보 조회 */ SELECT MRK_STNG_CD AS SEN_ABSENT_RATIO_CD , MRK_STNG_CDNM AS SEN_ABSENT_RATIO_NM , MRK_STNG_VL AS SEN_ABSENT_RATIO_VAL FROM TB_LMS_SCORE_ATND_CONF WHERE ORG_ID = 'ORG0000001' AND MRK_STNG_GBNCD = 'LESSON' AND MRK_STNG_CD = 'SEN_ABSENT_RATIO'

/* SQL ID : selectWeek1SeasonClass 설 명 : 출석점수기준 강의 계절학기 1주차 강의수 조회 */ SELECT MRK_STNG_CD AS SEN_LESN_WEEK1_CD , MRK_STNG_CDNM AS SEN_LESN_WEEK1_NM , MRK_STNG_VL AS SEN_LESN_WEEK1_VAL FROM TB_LMS_SCORE_ATND_CONF WHERE ORG_ID = 'ORG0000001' AND MRK_STNG_GBNCD = 'LESSON' AND MRK_STNG_CD = 'SEN_LESN_WEEK1'

/* SQL ID : selectWeek2SeasonClass 설 명 : 출석점수기준 강의 계절학기 2주차 강의수 조회 */ SELECT MRK_STNG_CD AS SEN_LESN_WEEK2_CD , MRK_STNG_CDNM AS SEN_LESN_WEEK2_NM , MRK_STNG_VL AS SEN_LESN_WEEK2_VAL FROM TB_LMS_SCORE_ATND_CONF WHERE ORG_ID = 'ORG0000001' AND MRK_STNG_GBNCD = 'LESSON' AND MRK_STNG_CD = 'SEN_LESN_WEEK2'

/* SQL ID : selectWeek3SeasonClass 설 명 : 출석점수기준 강의 계절학기 3주차 강의수 조회 */ SELECT MRK_STNG_CD AS SEN_LESN_WEEK3_CD , MRK_STNG_CDNM AS SEN_LESN_WEEK3_NM , MRK_STNG_VL AS SEN_LESN_WEEK3_VAL FROM TB_LMS_SCORE_ATND_CONF WHERE ORG_ID = 'ORG0000001' AND MRK_STNG_GBNCD = 'LESSON' AND MRK_STNG_CD = 'SEN_LESN_WEEK3'

/* SQL ID : selectWeek4SeasonClass 설 명 : 출석점수기준 강의 계절학기 4주차 강의수 조회 */ SELECT MRK_STNG_CD AS SEN_LESN_WEEK4_CD , MRK_STNG_CDNM AS SEN_LESN_WEEK4_NM , MRK_STNG_VL AS SEN_LESN_WEEK4_VAL FROM TB_LMS_SCORE_ATND_CONF WHERE ORG_ID = 'ORG0000001' AND MRK_STNG_GBNCD = 'LESSON' AND MRK_STNG_CD = 'SEN_LESN_WEEK4'

/* SQL ID : selectAbsentScoreClass 설 명 : 출석점수기준 강의 출석평가 정보 조회 */ SELECT LISTAGG(CASE WHEN MRK_STNG_CD = 'ABSENT_SCORE_5' THEN SUBSTR(MRK_STNG_CDNM, 8) END, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY MRK_STNG_CDNM) AS ABSENT_SCORE_NM5, LISTAGG(CASE WHEN MRK_STNG_CD = 'ABSENT_SCORE_4' THEN SUBSTR(MRK_STNG_CDNM, 8) END, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY MRK_STNG_CDNM) AS ABSENT_SCORE_NM4, LISTAGG(CASE WHEN MRK_STNG_CD = 'ABSENT_SCORE_3' THEN SUBSTR(MRK_STNG_CDNM, 8) END, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY MRK_STNG_CDNM) AS ABSENT_SCORE_NM3, LISTAGG(CASE WHEN MRK_STNG_CD = 'ABSENT_SCORE_2' THEN SUBSTR(MRK_STNG_CDNM, 8) END, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY MRK_STNG_CDNM) AS ABSENT_SCORE_NM2, LISTAGG(CASE WHEN MRK_STNG_CD = 'ABSENT_SCORE_1' THEN SUBSTR(MRK_STNG_CDNM, 8) END, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY MRK_STNG_CDNM) AS ABSENT_SCORE_NM1, LISTAGG(CASE WHEN MRK_STNG_CD = 'ABSENT_SCORE_5' THEN MRK_STNG_VL END, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY MRK_STNG_VL) AS ABSENT_SCORE_VAL5, LISTAGG(CASE WHEN MRK_STNG_CD = 'ABSENT_SCORE_4' THEN MRK_STNG_VL END, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY MRK_STNG_VL) AS ABSENT_SCORE_VAL4, LISTAGG(CASE WHEN MRK_STNG_CD = 'ABSENT_SCORE_3' THEN MRK_STNG_VL END, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY MRK_STNG_VL) AS ABSENT_SCORE_VAL3, LISTAGG(CASE WHEN MRK_STNG_CD = 'ABSENT_SCORE_2' THEN MRK_STNG_VL END, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY MRK_STNG_VL) AS ABSENT_SCORE_VAL2, LISTAGG(CASE WHEN MRK_STNG_CD = 'ABSENT_SCORE_1' THEN MRK_STNG_VL END, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY MRK_STNG_VL) AS ABSENT_SCORE_VAL1, LISTAGG(CASE WHEN MRK_STNG_CD = 'ABSENT_SCORE_5' THEN MRK_STNG_CD END, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY MRK_STNG_CD) AS ABSENT_SCORE_CD5, LISTAGG(CASE WHEN MRK_STNG_CD = 'ABSENT_SCORE_4' THEN MRK_STNG_CD END, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY MRK_STNG_CD) AS ABSENT_SCORE_CD4, LISTAGG(CASE WHEN MRK_STNG_CD = 'ABSENT_SCORE_3' THEN MRK_STNG_CD END, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY MRK_STNG_CD) AS ABSENT_SCORE_CD3, LISTAGG(CASE WHEN MRK_STNG_CD = 'ABSENT_SCORE_2' THEN MRK_STNG_CD END, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY MRK_STNG_CD) AS ABSENT_SCORE_CD2, LISTAGG(CASE WHEN MRK_STNG_CD = 'ABSENT_SCORE_1' THEN MRK_STNG_CD END, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY MRK_STNG_CD) AS ABSENT_SCORE_CD1 FROM TB_LMS_SCORE_ATND_CONF WHERE ORG_ID = 'ORG0000001' AND MRK_STNG_GBNCD = 'LESSON' AND MRK_STNG_CD IN ('ABSENT_SCORE_1', 'ABSENT_SCORE_2', 'ABSENT_SCORE_3', 'ABSENT_SCORE_4', 'ABSENT_SCORE_5') ORDER BY MRK_STNG_CD DESC
mapper.update: /* SQL ID : editAbsentScoreClass5 설 명 : 출석점수기준 강의 출석평가 정보 수정 */ UPDATE TB_LMS_SCORE_ATND_CONF SET MRK_STNG_VL = (SELECT A.MRK_STNG_VL FROM ( SELECT #{absentScoreVal5} AS MRK_STNG_VL FROM TB_LMS_SCORE_ATND_CONF WHERE MRK_STNG_CD = #{absentScoreCd5}) A) WHERE ORG_ID = 'ORG0000001' AND MRK_STNG_GBNCD = 'LESSON' AND MRK_STNG_CD = #{absentScoreCd5}

/* SQL ID : editAbsentScoreClass4 설 명 : 출석점수기준 강의 출석평가 정보 수정 */ UPDATE TB_LMS_SCORE_ATND_CONF SET MRK_STNG_VL = (SELECT B.MRK_STNG_VL FROM ( SELECT #{absentScoreVal4} AS MRK_STNG_VL FROM TB_LMS_SCORE_ATND_CONF WHERE MRK_STNG_CD = #{absentScoreCd4}) B) WHERE ORG_ID = 'ORG0000001' AND MRK_STNG_GBNCD = 'LESSON' AND MRK_STNG_CD = #{absentScoreCd4}

/* SQL ID : editAbsentScoreClass3 설 명 : 출석점수기준 강의 출석평가 정보 수정 */ UPDATE TB_LMS_SCORE_ATND_CONF SET MRK_STNG_VL = (SELECT C.MRK_STNG_VL FROM ( SELECT #{absentScoreVal3} AS MRK_STNG_VL FROM TB_LMS_SCORE_ATND_CONF WHERE MRK_STNG_CD = #{absentScoreCd3}) C) WHERE ORG_ID = 'ORG0000001' AND MRK_STNG_GBNCD = 'LESSON' AND MRK_STNG_CD = #{absentScoreCd3}

/* SQL ID : editAbsentScoreClass2 설 명 : 출석점수기준 강의 출석평가 정보 수정 */ UPDATE TB_LMS_SCORE_ATND_CONF SET MRK_STNG_VL = (SELECT D.MRK_STNG_VL FROM ( SELECT #{absentScoreVal2} AS MRK_STNG_VL FROM TB_LMS_SCORE_ATND_CONF WHERE MRK_STNG_CD = #{absentScoreCd2}) D) WHERE ORG_ID = 'ORG0000001' AND MRK_STNG_GBNCD = 'LESSON' AND MRK_STNG_CD = #{absentScoreCd2}

/* SQL ID : editAbsentScoreClass1 설 명 : 출석점수기준 강의 출석평가 정보 수정 */ UPDATE TB_LMS_SCORE_ATND_CONF SET MRK_STNG_VL = (SELECT E.MRK_STNG_VL FROM ( SELECT #{absentScoreVal1} AS MRK_STNG_VL FROM TB_LMS_SCORE_ATND_CONF WHERE MRK_STNG_CD = #{absentScoreCd1}) E) WHERE ORG_ID = 'ORG0000001' AND MRK_STNG_GBNCD = 'LESSON' AND MRK_STNG_CD = #{absentScoreCd1}

/* SQL ID : editLateScoreClass1 설 명 : 출석점수기준 강의 지각감전기준 정보 수정 */ UPDATE TB_LMS_SCORE_ATND_CONF SET MRK_STNG_VL = (SELECT A.MRK_STNG_VL FROM ( SELECT #{lateScoreVal1} AS MRK_STNG_VL FROM TB_LMS_SCORE_ATND_CONF WHERE MRK_STNG_CD = #{lateScoreCd1}) A) WHERE ORG_ID = 'ORG0000001' AND MRK_STNG_GBNCD = 'LESSON' AND MRK_STNG_CD = #{lateScoreCd1}

/* SQL ID : editLateScoreClass2 설 명 : 출석점수기준 강의 지각감전기준 정보 수정 */ UPDATE TB_LMS_SCORE_ATND_CONF SET MRK_STNG_VL = (SELECT B.MRK_STNG_VL FROM ( SELECT #{lateScoreVal2} AS MRK_STNG_VL FROM TB_LMS_SCORE_ATND_CONF WHERE MRK_STNG_CD = #{lateScoreCd2}) B) WHERE ORG_ID = 'ORG0000001' AND MRK_STNG_GBNCD = 'LESSON' AND MRK_STNG_CD = #{lateScoreCd2}

/* SQL ID : editLateScoreClass3 설 명 : 출석점수기준 강의 지각감전기준 정보 수정 */ UPDATE TB_LMS_SCORE_ATND_CONF SET MRK_STNG_VL = (SELECT C.MRK_STNG_VL FROM ( SELECT #{lateScoreVal3} AS MRK_STNG_VL FROM TB_LMS_SCORE_ATND_CONF WHERE MRK_STNG_CD = #{lateScoreCd3}) C) WHERE ORG_ID = 'ORG0000001' AND MRK_STNG_GBNCD = 'LESSON' AND MRK_STNG_CD = #{lateScoreCd3}

/* SQL ID : editLateScoreClass4 설 명 : 출석점수기준 강의 지각감전기준 정보 수정 */ UPDATE TB_LMS_SCORE_ATND_CONF SET MRK_STNG_VL = (SELECT D.MRK_STNG_VL FROM ( SELECT #{lateScoreVal4} AS MRK_STNG_VL FROM TB_LMS_SCORE_ATND_CONF WHERE MRK_STNG_CD = #{lateScoreCd4}) D) WHERE ORG_ID = 'ORG0000001' AND MRK_STNG_GBNCD = 'LESSON' AND MRK_STNG_CD = #{lateScoreCd4}

/* SQL ID : editLateScoreClass5 설 명 : 출석점수기준 강의 지각감전기준 정보 수정 */ UPDATE TB_LMS_SCORE_ATND_CONF SET MRK_STNG_VL = (SELECT E.MRK_STNG_VL FROM ( SELECT #{lateScoreVal5} AS MRK_STNG_VL FROM TB_LMS_SCORE_ATND_CONF WHERE MRK_STNG_CD = #{lateScoreCd5}) E) WHERE ORG_ID = 'ORG0000001' AND MRK_STNG_GBNCD = 'LESSON' AND MRK_STNG_CD = #{lateScoreCd5}

/* SQL ID : editLateScoreClass6 설 명 : 출석점수기준 강의 지각감전기준 정보 수정 */ UPDATE TB_LMS_SCORE_ATND_CONF SET MRK_STNG_VL = (SELECT F.MRK_STNG_VL FROM ( SELECT #{lateScoreVal6} AS MRK_STNG_VL FROM TB_LMS_SCORE_ATND_CONF WHERE MRK_STNG_CD = #{lateScoreCd6}) F) WHERE ORG_ID = 'ORG0000001' AND MRK_STNG_GBNCD = 'LESSON' AND MRK_STNG_CD = #{lateScoreCd6}

/* SQL ID : editLateScoreClass7 설 명 : 출석점수기준 강의 지각감전기준 정보 수정 */ UPDATE TB_LMS_SCORE_ATND_CONF SET MRK_STNG_VL = (SELECT G.MRK_STNG_VL FROM ( SELECT #{lateScoreVal7} AS MRK_STNG_VL FROM TB_LMS_SCORE_ATND_CONF WHERE MRK_STNG_CD = #{lateScoreCd7}) G) WHERE ORG_ID = 'ORG0000001' AND MRK_STNG_GBNCD = 'LESSON' AND MRK_STNG_CD = #{lateScoreCd7}
mapper.select: /* SQL ID : selectSeminarRatio 설 명 : 세미나 출석기준 출석비율 */ SELECT MRK_STNG_GBNCD , MRK_STNG_CD AS SEMINAR_ATND_RATIO_CD , MRK_STNG_CDNM AS SEMINAR_ATND_RATIO_NM , MRK_STNG_VL AS SEMINAR_ATND_RATIO_VAL , USEYN FROM TB_LMS_SCORE_ATND_CONF WHERE ORG_ID = 'ORG0000001' AND MRK_STNG_GBNCD = 'SEMINAR' AND MRK_STNG_CD = 'SEMINAR_ATND_RATIO'

/* SQL ID : selectSeminarTm 설 명 : 세미나 출석기준 출석시간 */ SELECT MRK_STNG_GBNCD , MRK_STNG_CD AS SEMINAR_ATND_TM_CD , MRK_STNG_CDNM AS SEMINAR_ATND_TM_NM , MRK_STNG_VL AS SEMINAR_ATND_TM_VAL , USEYN FROM TB_LMS_SCORE_ATND_CONF WHERE ORG_ID = 'ORG0000001' AND MRK_STNG_GBNCD = 'SEMINAR' AND MRK_STNG_CD = 'SEMINAR_ATND_TM'

/* SQL ID : selectSeminarLateRatio 설 명 : 세미나 출석기준 지각비율 */ SELECT MRK_STNG_GBNCD , MRK_STNG_CD AS SEMINAR_LATE_RATIO_CD , MRK_STNG_CDNM AS SEMINAR_LATE_RATIO_NM , MRK_STNG_VL AS SEMINAR_LATE_RATIO_VAL , USEYN FROM TB_LMS_SCORE_ATND_CONF WHERE ORG_ID = 'ORG0000001' AND MRK_STNG_GBNCD = 'SEMINAR' AND MRK_STNG_CD = 'SEMINAR_LATE_RATIO'

/* SQL ID : selectSeminarLateTm 설 명 : 세미나 출석기준 지각시간 */ SELECT MRK_STNG_GBNCD , MRK_STNG_CD AS SEMINAR_LATE_TM_CD , MRK_STNG_CDNM AS SEMINAR_LATE_TM_NM , MRK_STNG_VL AS SEMINAR_LATE_TM_VAL , USEYN FROM TB_LMS_SCORE_ATND_CONF WHERE ORG_ID = 'ORG0000001' AND MRK_STNG_GBNCD = 'SEMINAR' AND MRK_STNG_CD = 'SEMINAR_LATE_TM'

/* SQL ID : selectSeminarAbsentRatio 설 명 : 세미나 출석기준 결석비율 */ SELECT MRK_STNG_GBNCD , MRK_STNG_CD AS SEMINAR_ABSENT_RATIO_CD , MRK_STNG_CDNM AS SEMINAR_ABSENT_RATIO_NM , MRK_STNG_VL AS SEMINAR_ABSENT_RATIO_VAL , USEYN FROM TB_LMS_SCORE_ATND_CONF WHERE ORG_ID = 'ORG0000001' AND MRK_STNG_GBNCD = 'SEMINAR' AND MRK_STNG_CD = 'SEMINAR_ABSENT_RATIO'
/* SQL ID : selectCRelCdLList 설 명 : 성적기초정보관리 > 등록된 등급 조회 */ SELECT EVL_CRTR_CD FROM MRK_RLTV_EVL_CRTRRT WHERE ORG_ID = #{orgId} AND UNIV_CD = 'C' ORDER BY GRD_SEQ
/* SQL ID : selectGRelCdLList 설 명 : 성적기초정보관리 > 등록된 등급 조회 */ SELECT EVL_CRTR_CD FROM MRK_RLTV_EVL_CRTRRT WHERE ORG_ID = #{orgId} AND UNIV_CD = 'G' ORDER BY GRD_SEQ
